module_info.docstring: Git operations via subprocess — fetch, diff, show ancestor content.

classes.name: GitError
classes.docstring: Raised when a git operation fails unexpectedly.

functions.name: fetch_and_reset
functions.docstring:
Fetch origin and hard-reset to latest.

Raises GitError if fetch or reset fails.

functions.name: commit_is_reachable
functions.docstring: Check if a commit exists in the repo.

functions.name: count_new_commits
functions.docstring: Count commits between since_commit and HEAD.

functions.name: get_changed_files
functions.docstring:
Return list of (status, filepath) changed since commit.

Status is one of: A (added), M (modified), D (deleted).

functions.name: get_ancestor_content
functions.docstring: Get file content at a specific commit. Returns None if not found.
